meta.title: Neanderthal Technology
meta.sourceDoc: 118. P3 - Neanderthal Technology 尼安德特人的生存技艺.pdf
meta.matchedTitle: Neanderthal Technology 尼安德特人的生存技艺

passageNotes.label: Source
passageNotes.text: Explanations were extracted from the answer-analysis table in the source PDF by OCR. Minor OCR mistakes may remain; the official answer key is used for the answer field.

questionSections.text:
题目 27
答案：v
PDF 定位：第A段：..open-air sites with some sort of constructed shelter were the only option. ... We now know much more about the cave sites than the open-air ones...
PDF 解析：A段整段在对比"洞穴居所"与"露天居所"，并 cave sites open-air sites 解释为何我们对洞穴了解更多，故为"对比两 种住所"。

题目 28
答案：iii
PDF 定位：第B段：..made ideal homes...";"an exceptionallybenign habitat..";"men never needed to travel far from home to find abundant supplies of meat."
PDF 解析：ideal homes / benign habitat / abundant 描述佩里戈尔地区气候温和、资源丰富、非常讠 supplies 宜居住，契合"完美居所"。

题目 29
答案：i
PDF 定位：第c段..open-air sites...nearwater..." . evidence... of windbreaks, or even a large tent-ring... of mainly mammoth bones..."
PDF 解析：open-air sites / tent-ring C段提供了露天营地与"帐篷环"等直接证据， 选"户外住所的证据"。

题目 30
答案：iv
PDF 定位：第D段：..kin tent within the cave..." "wolf and fox foot bones. indicate the use of animal pelts as bed coverings."; ..ash... edged with small marine mollusc shells.."; "...ten squaremetres ofcobbles..to take care of a puddle area...
PDF 解析：finds/bones/ash/shells/cobbles D段详细罗列洞穴中的各类遗存与物品，本质！ "检查洞穴内容物"。

题目 31
答案：vi
PDF 定位：第E段：..survival... is inconceivablewithout control of fire."; "Fire gave warmth, light, heat for cooking and defence....
PDF 解析：fire essential / survival E段强调火对生存至关重要与其功能，完全对E "重要能量来源"。

questionSections.text:
题目 32
答案：E
PDF 定位：第E段："A charred piece of birch from Krapina in Croatia..."
PDF 解析：charred piece of birch = burnt piece of wood "charred（烧焦的）木头"即"烧焦的木块"。

题目 33
答案：D
PDF 定位：第D段：..tensquaremetres of cobbles... laid down, as though to take care of a puddle area in the cave..
PDF 解析：take care of a puddle area = prevent pools 铺卵石为处理/防止积水。 of water

题目 34
答案：C
PDF 定位：第D段：..ash at Lazaret...edged with small marine mollusc shell..."
PDF 解析：海洋软体动物的壳即"海生物遗骸"。 marine mollusc shells = remains of sea creatures

题目 35
答案：B
PDF 定位：第C段..a large tentring...ofmainly mammoth bones..
PDF 解析：tent-ring of bones = circular arrangement of "ring"=环状/圆形排列。 animal bones

题目 36
答案：C
PDF 定位：第D段：...wolf and fox foot bones... indicate the use of animal pelts as bed coverings."
PDF 解析：兽皮作铺盖→保暖用皮毛。 animal pelts as bed coverings = use of animal fur for warmth

questionSections.text:
题目 37
答案：sub-arctic
PDF 定位：第E段:...survival in the sub-arctic conditions... is inconceivable without control of fire."
PDF 解析：说明没有火在"亚北极条件"下无法生存。

题目 38
答案：short
PDF 定位：第E段："..this firewasonly ofshortduration."
PDF 解析：题干为"lasteda _time""，对应"ashorttime"。

题目 39
答案：predatory animals
PDF 定位：第E段："Fire gave...defence against predatory animals."
PDF 解析：明确指出火用于抵御"食肉/掠食动物"。 精确定位与理由

questionSections.text:
题目 40
答案：C
PDF 解析：全文按A-E依次讨论洞穴与露天住地的分布、具体地点的证据与遗物、用 火情况，并未论证迁原因（排除B)、也未聚焦房屋尺寸（排除A)，更非 按时间追踪发展历程（排除D)。因此最契合的是"讨论已知的尼安德特人 居址与聚落"。
